title: Kurios: Cabinet of Curiosities
full_description: Step into the curio cabinet of an inventor convinced of the existence of a hidden, invisible world just beyond our own. When outlandish, benevolent characters turn the Seeker's world upside down with a touch of poetry and humour, his curios jump to life one by one. A cast of 50 artists from 21 countries; mechanical marionettes, curious creatures, and spectacular acrobatics in a steampunk universe where curiosity defies reality.
ai_summary: Cirque du Soleil's steampunk spectacular — set inside a 19th-century cabinet of curiosities — follows an inventor whose imagination conjures a hidden parallel world of mechanical marionettes, acrobatic wonders, and surreal comic creatures. Two hours of pure theatrical enchantment under the Grand Chapiteau.
